tagline: Kansas City's Boutique Real Estate Brokerage
meta_description: Horner Realty KC LLC — a family-run boutique brokerage helping buyers and sellers across the Greater Kansas City area.
office_line: Horner Realty KC LLC · Mission, KS 66205

hero.eyebrow: A boutique brokerage · Greater Kansas City
hero.sub: Family-run, fiercely local, and built on one simple philosophy — clients come first.

about_p1: We're a small team by design. When you work with us, you're never handed off to an assistant — you get constant communication, honest advice, and people who treat your move like their own.
about_p2: Buying or selling a home is more than a transaction — it's a life-changing moment, and our only measure of success is that you walk away from it with an amazing experience.
services_h2: Two sides of the table. One standard.
quote: "If you're not left with an amazing experience, we haven't done our job."

values.title: Professionalism
values.body: Ongoing training and the most up-to-date tools, so the advice you get is never yesterday's.

values.title: Integrity
values.body: Honest, ethical, confidential service — the kind that earns respect one client at a time.

values.title: Knowledge
values.body: Deep, lived-in understanding of the metro on both sides of the state line.

sold_blurb: A look at homes we've recently guided to the closing table, across the metro.
footer_about: A family-run boutique brokerage providing real estate services across the Greater Kansas City area.

team.name: Alicia Horner
team.bio: A local who has guided buyers and sellers for over two decades.

team.name: Brian Horner
team.bio: Living in the Northland with his family, Brian brings years of metro market expertise.

team.name: Tyler Logan
team.bio: Brings fresh energy and a sharp eye to every showing, with a clients-first standard.

listings.description: Sun-filled two-story with a renovated kitchen and finished lower level.
Charming updated split-level near parks and shops.
Open chef's kitchen, two fireplaces, over 3,400 sq ft.
